name: You Are So Sweet
overview: Xia Xiaoning, an aspiring voice actress, becomes the assistant to the talented but secretive Gu Chenyu. As she navigates her new job, she finds herself caught between her difficult boss and the pursuing CEO, Xie Fei, leading to a tangled love triangle.

trailers.title: 🍭OFFICIAL TRAILER🍭 You Are So Sweet (Eden Zhao, Amy Sun) (2020) Idol, Boss or Boyfriend?
